description: A well-formed §7.2 child POST. Both pubkeys base64url-decode to EXACTLY 32 bytes; v==1; cert chain non-empty; binding_sig is even-length hex. The slice-(b) endpoint must accept the shape and hand it to slice (c) for attestation/SAS (it does NOT itself attest or pin).

notes.child_ed25519_pub: base64url(unpadded) of 32 bytes each 0x03 — decodes to exactly 32 bytes
notes.child_x25519_pub: base64url(unpadded) of 32 bytes each 0x04 — decodes to exactly 32 bytes
notes.child_attestation_cert_chain: opaque placeholder here; full DER validation is slice (c), not (b)
notes.child_binding_sig: opaque even-length hex placeholder; full ECDSA-P-256 verify is slice (c)

expect: ACCEPTED_SHAPE — parsed, byte-validated, handed to slice (c) verifier
